source.boundary: Dashboard page shell is excluded; this artifact starts at grid_table_col_wrapper and includes every descendant plus page-level dependencies needed by the template.
templateArtifactNormalizations: Filled missing plain-string attrs.heads.color on two exported Text controls so the reference artifact can be linted as a complete generator source-of-truth; no YAPK source package was modified.

usageContract.materializationRule: Clone grid_table_col_wrapper and every descendant as the source of truth. Do not hand-build a visually similar grid-table Collection.
usageContract.hostRule: Place the cloned wrapper only inside an approved Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 section_content_area or equivalent allowed content slot.

allowedChanges: Update grid_table_col_title text to the business/data-source title. Preserve exported style, layout, typography, and wrapper settings.
May add/delete controls. Prefer preserving Search filter and Add item button. Search filter placeholder and Add item text may be business-mapped.
May change displayed header labels and column count/widths according to business fields, but header grid and item grid column count, widths, and other column properties must remain identical.

May change item-cell content according to business fields. User fields use dynamic-user, Image fields use dynamic-image, File/Attachment fields use dynamic-file, all other business fields use dynamic-field.
Optional for Data list / Document library operations. May add operation buttons under grid_table_col_item_op_menu. Omit the whole operation region for display-only/non-editable sources.

lockedRegions: grid_table_col_wrapper itself and every descendant outside the editable regions must strictly preserve the exported control settings.
grid_table_col_item_op_menu Drop bar shell must keep its exported structure when item operations are present.
Collection root actions and operation-button action references must remain coherent; edit/delete buttons require matching Collection actions.
Delete item flows require the page-level confirmation temp variable and conditional delete flow from the template when delete is offered.

displayOnlyMode.appliesWhen: Dashboard region only displays Form report/Data report rows or a read-only Data list/Document library projection.
requiredOmissions: grid_table_col_caption when no toolbar/title/action area is needed

sourceResourceTypeRules.dataListOrDocumentLibrary: May include add/edit/delete operations when business requirements need them and Collection actions are present.
sourceResourceTypeRules.formReportOrDataReport: View-only. Do not include grid_table_col_item_operations or editable/delete operation controls.

usageContract.headerItemParity: grid_table_col_header and grid_col_item must always keep the same column count, column widths, and column property signature after business mapping.

confirm_qs.value: Are you sure that you want to delete this item?
Are you sure that you want to delete this item?
